'''dovabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeep|jeep]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeep|jeep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dovabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dovabithi|dovabithi]] || [[word:dovabiji|dovabiji]] || [[word:dovabishi|dovabishi]] || [[word:dovabiki|dovabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dovabuthuthu|dovabuthuthu]] || [[word:dovabujuju|dovabujuju]] || [[word:dovabushushu|dovabushushu]] || [[word:dovabukuku|dovabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dovabuthu|dovabuthu]] || [[word:dovabuju|dovabuju]] || [[word:dovabushu|dovabushu]] || [[word:dovabuku|dovabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dovabufthuf|dovabufthuf]] || [[word:dovabufjuf|dovabufjuf]] || [[word:dovabufshuf|dovabufshuf]] || [[word:dovabufkuf|dovabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dovabethe|dovabethe]] || [[word:dovabeje|dovabeje]] || [[word:dovabeshe|dovabeshe]] || [[word:dovabeke|dovabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dovabothotho|dovabothotho]] || [[word:dovabojojo|dovabojojo]] || [[word:dovaboshosho|dovaboshosho]] || [[word:dovabokoko|dovabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dovabotho|dovabotho]] || [[word:dovabojo|dovabojo]] || [[word:dovabosho|dovabosho]] || [[word:dovaboko|dovaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dovabofthof|dovabofthof]] || [[word:dovabofjof|dovabofjof]] || [[word:dovabofshof|dovabofshof]] || [[word:dovabofkof|dovabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfthĂŻf|dovabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfjĂŻf|dovabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfshĂŻf|dovabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfkĂŻf|dovabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dovabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dovabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dovabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dovabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfthĂŻf|dovabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfjĂŻf|dovabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfshĂŻf|dovabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfkĂŻf|dovabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfthĂŻf|dovabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfjĂŻf|dovabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfshĂŻf|dovabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dovabĂŻfkĂŻf|dovabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dovabĂŠthĂŠ|dovabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dovabĂŠjĂŠ|dovabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dovabĂŠshĂŠ|dovabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dovabĂŠkĂŠ|dovabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dovabathatha|dovabathatha]] || [[word:dovabajaja|dovabajaja]] || [[word:dovabashasha|dovabashasha]] || [[word:dovabakaka|dovabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dovabatha|dovabatha]] || [[word:dovabaja|dovabaja]] || [[word:dovabasha|dovabasha]] || [[word:dovabaka|dovabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dovabafthaf|dovabafthaf]] || [[word:dovabafjaf|dovabafjaf]] || [[word:dovabafshaf|dovabafshaf]] || [[word:dovabafkaf|dovabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dovabasha|dovabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dovabshĂ«sha|dovabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dovabrosha|dovabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dovabmusha|dovabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dovabyasha|dovabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godovabnkshĂ«sha|godovabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godovabnkrosha|godovabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godovabnkmusha|godovabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godovabnkyasha|godovabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dovavabasha|dovavabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dovavabshĂ«sha|dovavabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dovavabrosha|dovavabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dovavabmusha|dovavabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dovavabyasha|dovavabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godovavabnkshĂ«sha|godovavabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godovavabnkrosha|godovavabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godovavabnkmusha|godovavabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godovavabnkyasha|godovavabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:devĂŠbasha|devĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:devĂŠbshĂ«sha|devĂŠbshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:devĂŠbrosha|devĂŠbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:devĂŠbmusha|devĂŠbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:devĂŠbyasha|devĂŠbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godevĂŠbnkshĂ«sha|godevĂŠbnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godevĂŠbnkrosha|godevĂŠbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godevĂŠbnkmusha|godevĂŠbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godevĂŠbnkyasha|godevĂŠbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dovfabasha|dovfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dovfabshĂ«sha|dovfabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dovfabrosha|dovfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dovfabmusha|dovfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dovfabyasha|dovfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godovfabnkshĂ«sha|godovfabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godovfabnkrosha|godovfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godovfabnkmusha|godovfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godovfabnkyasha|godovfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
